task-1781396177252-h0kh2z.description: Forex bot ICT 4-gate strategy produces zero signals. Diagnose which gate(s) block all trades and loosen/fix the logic so valid setups generate signals.

result.root_cause: strategy._validate() zero-volume check rejected every forex =X pair (Yahoo returns volume=0 for all FX bars), blocking all signals before any gate ran
result.fix: guard the zero-volume rejection with `if df_1h['volume'].sum() > 0` in forex_bot/strategy.py:_validate
result.verification: before: 0% passed _validate, 0 signals. after: 94% passed, 31 signals over 120d x 7 pairs
result.gates_status: gates were fine — diagnostic showed 17 signals; no gate changes needed
